---
title: "ソフトウェア"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: distill::distill_article
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
library(distilltools)
```

## `canaper`

系統的固有性（phylogenetic endemism）を測るためのRパッケージ

`r icon_link("github", "Code", "https://github.com/joelnitta/canaper")`
`r icon_link("globe", "Website", "https://joelnitta.github.io/canaper/")`
`r icon_link("zenodo", "Zenodo", "https://zenodo.org/record/5599240#.YZNJk1ORVBw")`

## `taxastand`

学名を整理するためのRパッケージ

`r icon_link("github", "Code", "https://github.com/joelnitta/taxastand/")`
`r icon_link("globe", "Website", "https://joelnitta.github.io/taxastand/")`
